message:
feat(layout,parser): clippy lints, const fn promotion, and idiomatic Rust cleanup

Replace manual arithmetic with mul_add/hypot/midpoint intrinsics for
floating-point accuracy and clarity. Promote pure methods (RenderGroup::new,
exceeds, guardrail_reason, algorithm_available_for_diagram) to const fn.
Suppress match_same_arms and many_single_char_names where intentional.
Add Eq derives to LayoutStageSnapshot and LayoutTrace. Use map_or instead
of map+unwrap_or, inline format args in test assertions, and simplify
the capability-fallback dispatch path. Fix tracing tests to clone captured
events before borrowing to avoid holding MutexGuard across assertions.
Update golden timeline_basic checksum and SVG to reflect layout changes.
Reformat numeric literals in parser tests with digit separators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
